name: RNEHeatmapChart
description: Heatmap chart for matrix data on category X/Y axes with theme-based cell coloring and React Native tooltips.

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: Category labels for the X axis (columns).

yAxisData.name: yAxisData
yAxisData.description: Category labels for the Y axis (rows).

data.name: data
data.description: Cell values as [xIndex, yIndex, value] tuples.

showLabel.name: showLabel
showLabel.description: When true, shows the numeric value on each cell. Default: false

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to emphasize the hovered cell. Default: true

showXAxis.name: showXAxis
showXAxis.description: Whether to show X-axis category labels. Default: true

showYAxis.name: showYAxis
showYAxis.description: Whether to show Y-axis category labels. Default: true

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Built-in cell tooltip preset: card, compact, kpi, striped, or none.

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Default: 320

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Default: 300

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override merged with ChartThemeContext.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Series colors for the cell color gradient (low to high).
